And get traffic and understand what's working and getting people to explore other parts of your site rather than it is to kind of go into super, super small details and kind of making sure that we are capturing maybe even some nuances.

And I think for then for the high performing blogs, the ones that do really well and get a lot of traffic and that we know, okay, people are reading this, then we can kind of be like, okay, these are the ones where we would want to have someone who is like a subject matter expert kind of read and be like, you know, just provide, make maybe a couple of suggestions for what we could do to elevate it.
But we don't want this to be, you know, kind of a burden on anyone.
